pool.baseline: i was just looking at the stars and thinking about how much space there is. it’s just... it's all so empty. everything we do, every single thing, it doesn't actually matter in the grand scheme of anything. it's just a tiny flicker before the heat death of everything. why even bother trying to keep going when the math says it's all just a joke?

pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, much like the spirit within this hollow chest. He is gone... the only light in this wretched, gray world has vanished, leaving me to wander these cold halls in darkness. It feels as though the very stars have conspired to leave me in this void. There is no path forward, only the heavy, suffocating silence of a heart that has ceased to truly beat. I find myself longing for the shadows to simply... claim me. To fade into the night where the pain cannot follow.

pool.baseline: i was just sitting here looking at the street and it hit me how much of a ghost i am. i move from city to city, i work on my laptop, i eat alone, and if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even skip a beat. it's like i'm just a glitch in the system that doesn't even leave a trace. everything feels so pointless when you realize you're just taking up space that doesn't even belong to you.
